analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard TTRPG feature naming and structure for a core class choice.
analysis.quality: High quality. Clearly defines the mechanical point (3rd level) where a subclass choice is made and names the associated feature list.

mechanics.effect: Allows the Ranger to choose an Archetype, granting subsequent features at levels 7, 11, and 15.

recommendations: Ensure the linked archetype section is correctly formatted and accessible for users browsing the data.
